commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fbb0a94053975b1d09f0b4f8dd7628b7fbf0c035)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds apply-time validation for PR-to-PR duplicate/superseded close targets, updates review guidance and README policy text, and expands apply-decision tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the PR branch returns a safe result when an open clean canonical PR has no proof report or proof labels, and the added happy-path test covers that state.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for the proof-gate bug and real behavior proof; ClawSweeper repair should not replace the contributor's runtime proof.

target.title: Guard superseded PR closes against unsafe replacements
target.body:
﻿Fixes #197

## Summary
- Adds apply-time validation for PR-to-PR duplicate/superseded close targets.
- Refuses to close a PR against a linked replacement that is closed unmerged, unreadable, still proof-blocked, F-rated, draft, not cleanly mergeable, or already has its own high-confidence close report.
- Keeps the close path open for merged replacements or open replacements that look clean and proof-satisfied.
- Protects the same-author issue/PR pair preflight so the issue side does not close if the PR side points at an unsafe replacement.
- Updates the review prompt and README with the safe canonical PR rule.

## Why
ClawSweeper could previously close a PR as duplicate/superseded by another PR even when the replacement was itself closed unmerged or otherwise unsafe. That can hide useful contributor work behind a canonical target that will never land.

## Validation
- `pnpm run format`
- `pnpm run build:all`
- `pnpm run format:check`
- `pnpm run lint`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern "same-author pair close when PR supersession is unsafe|unrelated unsafe|non-clean linked|close comment|section-only unsafe|live labels supersede stale proof|unsafe linked|closed unmerged|bare cluster ref|cannot be read|already proposed for close|skipped close proposal|F-rated|live proof labels|unknown-mergeability|superseded by linked pull requests" test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `codex review --uncommitted` via the codex-review helper: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

`pnpm run check` also got through build/lint and most unit tests, but still hits the existing Windows-local failures unrelated to this change: `/usr/bin/git` is missing for one subprocess test, and a Unix file-mode assertion differs on Windows.
target.author: brokemac79

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
